creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161628
patch to fix build with OpenJDK8

Port fails to build with OpenJDK8 as default JDK. Attached patch fixes it.

Note this port is out of date and could use updating. The 2.3.1 release seems to be the latest at this time:

http://jogamp.org/wiki/index.php/Release_2.3.1

This PR and patch are just to fix the current version building with OpenJDK8.
